case.title: CURTISS NATIONAL BANK OF MIAMI SPRINGS v. SABATINO

opinion.h4: CURTISS NATIONAL BANK OF MIAMI SPRINGS v. SABATINO, (1970)
opinion.h2: CURTISS NATIONAL BANK OF MIAMI SPRINGS, petitioner, v. Louis A. SABATINO, etc. No. 959.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit.
Denied.[ Curtiss National Bank of Miami Springs v. Sabatino (1970) ]
